text:
enrollee CHAR 1 This field specifies whether enrollee was dually enrolled in Medicare Medicaid during the year, or enrolled only in Medicaid. CCW attempted to link each person (BENE_ID) who had a returned NDI record to both the Medicare and Medicaid enrollment data. Those with a match to both are classified as dually enrolled. Values:
D=person was dually enrolled
M=person was Medicaid only (not dual)
DEATH_DT Date of Death NUM 8 This field indicates the date of death of the enrollee according
